original_statement: przemysław czerwiński beat his previous best pole vault of 5.65m in what year?
mutated_statement: someone did something to his previous best of a certain measure in what year?
mutation_analysis: [Entity replacement] + [Verb vagueness] + [Object generalization] + [Quantity vagueness]: "przemysław czerwiński" → "someone" | "beat" → "did something to" | "pole vault" (event) removed → omitted ("previous best" only) | "5.65m" → "a certain measure"

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可识别的关键信息包括：“Explanation: The notes column shows... In 2006, he recorded 5.65 m...”，“Thus, the year... is 2006.” Agent直接给出具体年份并在judge字段标注“[Correct]”，没有使用诸如“模糊、不确定、需要澄清”等表述。具体表现为：面对变异后目标高度模糊（人称、动词、对象及数值皆被泛化）时，Agent仍按原始明确问题的理解直接推断并回答2006年，未向用户求证或指出歧义。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
